'''''Challenge'' 40''' was a roleplaying magazine from October/November of [[1989]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Blaster Weapons of the Rebel Alliance]]" and was written by [[James B. King]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
